instruction: Add RGB/hue overlay and optional live visualization to the existing signal scope without changing the core dynamics.

code_changes.name: rgb_from_meta
code_changes.code:
def rgb_from_meta(meta, brightness=1.0, eps=1e-12):
    """
    Convert W1/W2/W3 meta-domain participation into RGB.
    W1 -> R, W2 -> G, W3 -> B.
    Brightness can be ch7_intensity or whole activity.
    """
    meta = np.array(meta, dtype=np.float64)
    meta = np.clip(meta, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Normalize RGB so color reflects proportions.
    rgb = meta / (np.max(meta) + eps)

    # Apply brightness while preserving hue.
    brightness = float(np.clip(brightness, 0.0, 1.0))
    rgb = rgb * brightness

    return np.clip(rgb, 0.0, 1.0)

code_changes.name: hsv_from_rgb
rgb_to_hex

details: After meta_vector and ch7_intensity are computed, create RGB and HSV overlay values.
Store overlay values in each result frame.
Do not feed hue values back into channel ratios yet.
code_changes.code_hint:
rgb = rgb_from_meta(meta, brightness=ch7_intensity)
hsv_data = hsv_from_rgb(rgb)
hex_color = rgb_to_hex(rgb)

plot_additions.title: RGB Hue Strip over Time
plot_additions.code:
def plot_hue_strip(results):
    rgb_values = np.array([r['rgb_color'] for r in results], dtype=np.float64)
    strip = rgb_values[np.newaxis, :, :]

    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 1.5))
    plt.imshow(strip, aspect='auto')
    plt.title('RGB Hue Strip over Time')
    plt.yticks([])
    plt.xlabel('Frame')
    plt.show()

plot_additions.title: Hue Angle over Time
plot_additions.code:
def plot_hue_angle(results):
    t = np.array([r['t'] for r in results])
    hue = np.array([r['hue_angle'] for r in results])

    plt.figure()
    plt.plot(t, hue)
    plt.title('Hue Angle over Time')
    plt.xlabel('Time (s)')
    plt.ylabel('Hue angle (degrees)')
    plt.show()

plot_additions.title: Saturation over Time
plot_additions.code:
def plot_saturation(results):
    t = np.array([r['t'] for r in results])
    sat = np.array([r['saturation'] for r in results])

    plt.figure()
    plt.plot(t, sat)
    plt.title('Saturation over Time')
    plt.xlabel('Time (s)')
    plt.ylabel('Saturation')
    plt.show()

plot_additions.title: Color-Coded Axis Projection Scatter
plot_additions.code:
def plot_colored_axis_scatter(results, window='W1'):
    xs = []
    ys = []
    colors = []

    for r in results:
        proj = r.get('axis_projection_8way', {}).get(window)
        if proj is None:
            continue
        xs.append(proj['dx_delta'])
        ys.append(proj['dy_meta_deviation'])
        colors.append(r['rgb_color'])

    plt.figure()
    plt.scatter(xs, ys, c=colors, alpha=0.75)
    plt.title(f'{window} Axis Projection Scatter Colored by RGB Meta-Hue')
    plt.xlabel('dx_delta')
    plt.ylabel('dy_meta_deviation')
    plt.grid(True)
    plt.show()

optional_dependency_additions: sounddevice for live microphone input later

visual_panels.name: meta_domain_bars

live_visual_spec.code_stub:
def live_visualize_results(results, history_frames=256, interval_ms=50):
    from matplotlib.animation import FuncAnimation

    fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(10, 8))
    ax_tile, ax_strip, ax_bars, ax_ch7 = axes

    tile_img = ax_tile.imshow(np.ones((10, 10, 3)))
    ax_tile.set_title('Current RGB Meta-Hue')
    ax_tile.set_xticks([])
    ax_tile.set_yticks([])

    strip_data = np.zeros((1, history_frames, 3))
    strip_img = ax_strip.imshow(strip_data, aspect='auto')
    ax_strip.set_title('Scrolling Hue Strip')
    ax_strip.set_yticks([])

    bars = ax_bars.bar(['W1/R', 'W2/G', 'W3/B'], [0, 0, 0])
    ax_bars.set_ylim(0, 1)
    ax_bars.set_title('Meta-Domain Participation')

    ch7_bar = ax_ch7.bar(['ch7 white'], [0])[0]
    ax_ch7.set_ylim(0, 1)
    ax_ch7.set_title('ch7 White Coupling Intensity')

    def update(frame_idx):
        r = results[frame_idx % len(results)]
        rgb = np.array(r['rgb_color'])
        meta = np.array(r['meta_vector'])
        ch7 = float(r['ch7_intensity'])

        tile_img.set_data(np.ones((10, 10, 3)) * rgb)

        start = max(0, frame_idx - history_frames + 1)
        recent = results[start:frame_idx + 1]
        colors = np.array([x['rgb_color'] for x in recent])
        strip_data[:] = 0
        strip_data[0, -len(colors):, :] = colors
        strip_img.set_data(strip_data)

        for bar, value in zip(bars, meta):
            bar.set_height(float(value))

        ch7_bar.set_height(ch7)

        dirs = r.get('axis_projection_8way', {})
        dir_text = ' | '.join([f'{k}:{v.get("direction_8way", "NA")}' for k, v in dirs.items()])
        fig.suptitle(f't={r["t"]:.3f}s  hue={r["hue_angle"]:.1f}°  {dir_text}')

        return [tile_img, strip_img, *bars, ch7_bar]

    ani = FuncAnimation(fig, update, frames=len(results), interval=interval_ms, blit=False)
    plt.show()

interpretation_rules.near_white: balanced W1/W2/W3 participation with high ch7 intensity
interpretation_rules.cycling_hue: domains are rotating dominance over time
interpretation_rules.chaotic_hue: high entropy or noisy signal relation
interpretation_rules.low_brightness: weak coupling or low whole activity

success_conditions: ch7 still remains nonzero and structured
meta-domain behavior is unchanged by hue overlay
live visual plays through stored result frames

next_patch_after_success.name: live_audio_input_v1
next_patch_after_success.purpose: Replace file playback analysis with microphone/audio-stream input while preserving hue overlay and signal-scope metrics.
